name: venice-forge
description: Unofficial third-party desktop client for the Venice API. Not affiliated with Venice.ai, Inc.
author: fayeblade (@spearchucker667)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,vite -c green,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && concurrently -n vite,electron -c cyan,yellow "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server && npm run build:electron
scripts.verify:workspace-contracts: vitest run src/services/dbMigrations.test.ts src/types/project.test.ts src/stores/project-store.test.ts src/stores/chat-store.character.test.ts src/stores/media-store.test.ts src/components/layout/sidebar.test.tsx src/components/command-palette/CommandPalette.test.tsx src/components/gallery/gallery-view.test.tsx src/components/image/image-view.test.tsx --fileParallelism=false
scripts.verify:contracts:static: npm run verify:bundle-budget && npm run verify:safety-guard && npm run verify:markdown-links && npm run verify:repo-handoff-hygiene && npm run verify:theme-tokens && npm run verify:network-boundaries && npm run verify:venice-api-docs && npm run verify:ci-contract && npm run verify:agent-docs && npm run verify:image-policy && npm run verify:work-orders && npm run verify:no-native-dialogs && npm run verify:web-contents-view
scripts.verify:contracts:features:chat: echo '::group::verify:contracts:features:chat' && npm run verify:prompt-library && npm run verify:document-ingestion && echo '::endgroup::'
scripts.verify:contracts:features:image: echo '::group::verify:contracts:features:image' && npm run verify:model-aware-recipes && npm run verify:media-studio-power-tools && echo '::endgroup::'
scripts.verify:contracts:features:workflow: echo '::group::verify:contracts:features:workflow' && npm run verify:workflow-templates && npm run verify:rp-studio-polish && echo '::endgroup::'
scripts.verify:contracts:features:rp: echo '::group::verify:contracts:features:rp' && npm run verify:scene-composer && npm run verify:rp-studio-polish && npm run verify:research-workspace && npm run verify:research-browser && echo '::endgroup::'
scripts.verify:contracts:features:settings: echo '::group::verify:contracts:features:settings' && npm run verify:status-diagnostics && npm run verify:storage-privacy && npm run verify:storage-policy && echo '::endgroup::'
scripts.verify:contracts:features: npm run verify:contracts:features:chat && npm run verify:contracts:features:image && npm run verify:contracts:features:workflow && npm run verify:contracts:features:rp && npm run verify:contracts:features:settings
scripts.verify:contracts: npm run verify:contracts:static && npm run verify:contracts:features && npm run verify:contracts:release
scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run typecheck
scripts.test:ui:media: npm run test:ui:media:gallery && npm run test:ui:media:image
scripts.test:ui: npm run test:ui:layout && npm run test:ui:chat && npm run test:ui:media && npm run test:ui:research && npm run test:ui:settings
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:server && npm run test:electron && npm run test:ingestion && npm run test:unit && npm run test:ui
scripts.test:workflow:core: vitest run src/types/workflow.test.ts src/services/workflowCompiler.test.ts src/services/workflowRunner.test.ts src/lib/workflow-engine.test.ts src/lib/workflow-validator.test.ts src/lib/workflow-schema.test.ts src/lib/workflow-mutations.test.ts src/stores/workflow-template-store.test.ts
scripts.dist: npm run clean && npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never && npm run checksum:release
scripts.dist:win: npm run clean && npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --publish never && npm run checksum:release
scripts.dist:portable: npm run clean && npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win portable --publish never && npm run checksum:release
scripts.dist:mac: npm run clean && npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac --publish never && npm run checksum:release
scripts.dist:linux: npm run clean && npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux --publish never && npm run checksum:release
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run clean && npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac --arm64 --publish never && npm run checksum:release
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run clean && npm run verify:icon && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac --x64 --publish never && npm run checksum:release
scripts.ci: npm run lint:eslint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:ci && npm audit --audit-level=moderate && npm run build && npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:dist
